title: Routes logs runtime-shape compatibility lane precheck
delta_summary: logs routes now resolve runtime from colony_runtime or graph_runtime
fixes indentation path so _runtime_log_store lookup always executes when runtime exists
adds backward-compatible graph-scoped node logs route in addition to colony-scoped route

risk_signals.evidence: new route alias /graphs/{graph_id}/nodes/{node_id}/logs retained for UI/tests
risk_signals.impact: route registration drift may break node-log retrieval

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'logs or node_logs' -q
decision_gate: keep_local acceptable if logs/node_logs API contracts remain green
